section.div: RISC-V VMs in Minecraft. Continued by North Western Development, originally by Sangar.
《Hello 算法》：动画图解、一键运行的数据结构与算法教程。支持 Python, Java, C++, C, C#, JS, Go, Swift, Rust, Ruby, Kotlin, TS, Dart 代码。简体版和繁体版同步更新，English version ongoing
Understand Human Behavior to Align True Needs

div.div: Great developer ranked 2.65m out of 140m users
Maintaining or created a repository which has been forked 3 times
Registered a GPG key to sign commits
Starred a topic on GitHub Explore
Use GitHub Actions to automate profile updates
Kill 20 Jockeys with the shovel or pitchfork.
Kill a pouncing Hunter with a shotgun.
Kill a Tank only with damage from the original Survivors.
KILLING THEM SWIFTLY TO THIS SONG
Play the new Midnight Riders song on a jukebox.
Help porters through a MULE or terrorist area for the first time.
Complete at least 10 unique premium deliveries in each order category with an evaluation of "Legend," "Legend of Legends," or "Legend of Legends of Legends."
Find all the tarot graffiti for the job Fool on the Hill.
Stopped the bullying at Seiryo High School.
Complete a level without taking any damage.
Complete a level without killing anyone.
